The stadium with the largest capacity is Stade de France, which has a capacity of 81,338 and is located in Paris. Therefore, the city with the stadium that has the largest capacity is Paris.

Row 3: Grand Stade Lille Métropole (Villeneuve-d'Ascq) - 50,186
